definition:
1. to run by  or past , (Iliad by Homer) 
2. to outrun, overtake , (Iliad by Homer): π. τὰ τότε κακά to go beyond, exceed  them, (Euripides) 
3. to run through  or over, run across  (a space of ground expressed or implied), (Xenophon Historicus) 
4. to run over , i. e. treat in a cursory way , (Isocrates Orator):—; to slight, neglect , (Theocritus Poeta Bucolicus) 
5. to escape unnoticed , τινά (Polybius Historicus) (ML)
